black.description:
First revealed in February 2022 at the Donda 2 listening event in Miami, the adidas Yeezy Slide Onyx features an all-black foam construction with a soft footbed for comfort. At the base, a grooved outsole adds stability and responsiveness.

The adidas Yeezy Slide Onyx released in March of 2022 and retailed for $60.

title: adidas Samba OG Cloud White Core Black

white.description:
The adidas Samba OG Cloud White Core Black (Women's) represents a contemporary take on a timeless style, emanating an aesthetic charm that goes beyond its original athletic purpose.​
​​
​Crafted from full-grain leather, the upper of the Cloud White Core Black adidas Samba OG (Women's) offers a sturdy and resilient construction. A gray suede, paired with a contrasting black heel tab, introduces an element of sophistication to the overall design. The iconic serrated 3-Stripes appear in black on both the lateral and medial sides, creating a visually striking contrast. Enhancing the shoe's unique identity, a Bluebird tongue label and a foil logotype mark its distinctive DNA. Underneath, a brown gum rubber outsole ensures both traction and durability, underscoring the shoe's practicality and style.​
​​
​The standout characteristic of the adidas Samba OG Cloud White Core Black (Women's) lies in its signature T-toe design. This element pays homage to football pitches of the past, while embracing a forward-looking approach with its entirely vegan composition. The shoe debuted for $100 on December 1st, 2023.

other.description:
The adidas Yeezy Slide in Slate Marine showcases an unprecedented combination of style and comfort. The slate marine colorway released on August 11, 2023. A deviation from the norm, this slide presents a sculpted yet sleek design, dominated by a bold, Slate Marine hue.

This slide comes dressed in a captivating Slate Marine color scheme. The minimalistic approach creates a modern silhouette that's both trendy and comfortable. The slides feature a characteristic adidas marking on the footbed, as well as the Yeezy imprint subtly incorporated, adding a splash of exclusivity to your step.

What we love about the Yeezy Slide design is the cloud-like cushioning that effortlessly molds to your foot, offering an unparalleled comfort experience. This cool slide effortlessly blends comfort with chic aesthetics. The adidas Yeezy Slide in Slate Marine was launched on August 11, 2023, retailing at a cool $70.

title: adidas Gazelle Indoor Bad Bunny Cabo Rojo

white.description:
The adidas Yeezy Boost 350 V2 Bone features a triple white Primeknit upper with mesh side stripes and canvas heel tabs. At the base, a semi-translucent sole with Boost technology completes the design.

The adidas Yeezy Boost 350 V2 Bone released in March of 2022 and retailed for $230.

other.description:
The adidas Yeezy Foam RNR Onyx arrives with an Onyx, oval-cut foam construction made of part EVA and algae. At the base, a cushioned footbed offers comfort and support, while a sculptural sole with deep treads provides traction.

The adidas Yeezy Foam RNR Onyx released in June of 2022 and retailed for $80 and in March of 2024 and retailed for $90.

black.description:
With a triple black Primeknit upper, the adidas Yeezy 350 V2 Onyx takes it back to the basics, using its muted palette to emphasize the intricacies of its construction. A sheer mesh side stripe and canvas heel loop offer a subtle contrast in texture. At the base, a matching signature Boost sole provides comfort and support.

The adidas Yeezy 350 V2 Onyx released in the Spring of 2022 and retailed for $220.

title: adidas Samba OG Preloved Red Leopard (Women's)

white.description:
Take on a unique look with the adidas Samba OG Preloved Red Leopard (Women's). The sneaker gives you a second-life design with a striking pattern. Expect a distinct, worn-in appearance with contrasting colors and a cool design.

The Preloved Red Leopard Samba OG by adidas combines a leather upper with a variation of orange accents. Reddish orange leopard print overlays take up most of the space, with white 3 Stripes, laces, and a heel to add contrast and make the print stand out more. The shoe retains the classic Samba design, including the reinforced T-toe. The outsole uses gum rubber for grip. The design's history originates from indoor football shoes of the mid-20th century.

As the StockX experts, something we love about the adidas Samba OG Preloved Red Leopard (Women's) is the natural variation in the texture; each pair has a unique appearance. The slightly worn gum sole adds to the vintage appearance. The shoe retailed at $110 when it was released on the 29th of January, 2025.

red.description:
The adidas Yeezy Slide Slate Grey is a collaboration between adidas and Kanye West.
​
​The Slide Slate Grey adidas Yeezy comes in a slate grey color palette. The shoe features an upper constructed from a single piece of molded EVA foam, offering a lightweight and durable design. The slide's design features strategic cutouts and a breathable lining. The slide's outsole features a textured pattern that provides traction and stability. The Yeezy Slide features an effortless slip-on design for easy wear and removal.
​
​What we love about the adidas Yeezy Slide Slate Grey is its minimalist and sleek design. The slide is crafted with a one-piece construction, featuring a soft and comfortable foam compound for the upper, while the Slate Grey colorway adds a versatile and understated aesthetic. The adidas Yeezy Slide Slate Grey was released in 2023, and sold for a retail price of $70.

title: adidas Handball Spezial Earth Strata Gum (Women's)

white.description:
The adidas Handball Spezial Earth Strata Gum (Women's) upgrades the Handball Spezial silhouette with a neutral colorway of Earth Strata and Off White.

The upper construction boasts supple suede in Earth Strada and a tonal T-shaped toebox in the same material. Both the 3-Stripes logo and the panels that form the lace cage feature serrated edges. While Earth Strata is the dominant tone, Off White can be found on the 3-Stripes logo, the heel tab, the laces, and the tongue’s logo tag. This logo tag has a vintage-inspired design that finds inspiration in adidas’ retro handball catalog. Other branding details include ‘SPEZIAL’ printed along the 3-Stripes logo in metallic lettering and ‘adidas’ embossed into the outsole.

Our experts at StockX like the inclusion of standard-colored gum on the rubber outsole instead of light or medium gum. It gives the sneaker a vintage appearance. The women’s size adidas Handball Spezial Earth Strata Gum (Women's) was released on November 10th, 2023, and sold for $110.

title: adidas Yeezy Boost 350 V2 Steel Grey

grey.description:
The adidas Yeezy Boost 350 V2 Steel Gray paints this classic Yeezy silhouette in a gray-on-gray colorway with a tonal rubber outsole.

This sneaker was released after Ye, formally known as Kanye West, and adidas ended their partnership. The upper is made of breathable PrimeKnit, which creates a bootie-like fit and conforms to the foot’s shape. A semi-translucent strip of knit material runs across the side panel and allows the foot to breathe. The knit in this area is slightly looser than on other parts of the upper. A ribbed TPU cage wraps around the full-length Boost midsole. Although the TPU cage comes in Steel Gray, its texture adds contrast to the shoe’s design.

Our experts at StockX like the heel pull tab, which helps the wearer put on and take off the shoe. The adidas Yeezy Boost 350 V2 Steel Gray was released on February 29th, 2024, and retailed at $230.

title: adidas Yeezy Boost 350 V2 MX Dark Salt

black.description:
Released on August 21, 2023, the adidas Yeezy Boost 350 V2 MX Dark Salt is more than just a sneaker; it's a statement in style and comfort.

A contrasting mix of grey and black shades adorn the upper. This blend not only exudes a unique aesthetic but signifies the contemporary flair of the Yeezy lineage. Paired with the signature outsole and side stripe this sneaker is an easy to style classic. The cushioned Boost midsole cradles your foot, and creates a comfortable wear for every day use.

The adidas Yeezy Boost 350 V2 MX Dark Salt came with a price tag of $230. A must-have for every sneaker aficionado. Get your pair on StockX now.

title: adidas Samba OG Silver Metallic Cracked Leather (Women's)

white.description:
The adidas Samba OG Silver Metallic Cracked Leather (Women's) is a women’s sized low-profile silhouette that blends vintage football heritage with street-ready flair.

This women’s adidas Samba OG is all dressed up as it shimmers with a metallic cracked leather upper. The iconic t-toe on this model is accentuated by delicate stitching. The 3-Stripes in a jagged-edged crisp white adorn both sides of the shoe for a classic look. A padded white heel counter, white tongue, and white laces allow the silver patch on the tongue to shine. White Samba branding is next to the 3-Stripes on the lateral side. A gum-colored outsole finishes the elegant aesthetic.

We think the standout feature of the adidas Samba OG Silver Metallic Cracked Leather (Women's) has to be the metallic cracked leather. It adds just the right amount of shimmer to elevate everyday outfits while staying true to the Samba’s timeless appeal. Originally released on April 1, 2025, this shoe sold for $120 retail.

other.description:
Step into unparalleled comfort and minimalist style with the adidas Yeezy Slide Dark Onyx. This sleek, monochromatic slide is the epitome of understated luxury, featuring a uniform dark onyx colorway that pairs effortlessly with any casual outfit. The Yeezy Slide's design focuses on simplicity and functionality, offering a sophisticated take on casual footwear.

Crafted for those who value both style and comfort, the adidas Yeezy Slide Dark Onyx is built with a plush material that molds to the shape of your foot, ensuring all-day comfort. Its minimalist aesthetic is complemented by the slide's practicality, making it the perfect choice for a relaxed day out or a cozy evening at home. The adidas Yeezy Slide has quickly become a staple in the wardrobe of the fashion-forward, thanks to its versatile design and unparalleled comfort.

Since its release on March 7, 2024, with a retail price of $70, the adidas Yeezy Slide Dark Onyx has established itself as a must-have for sneaker enthusiasts and style mavens alike. Its release has been met with enthusiasm, solidifying its status as a timeless piece of casual footwear. If you're seeking a blend of simplicity, comfort, and style, the adidas Yeezy Slide Dark Onyx is a choice that delivers on all fronts.

red.description:
The adidas Yeezy 500 Stone Salt hails from the branch of adidas that used to work in collaboration with Kanye West. This singular-looking sneaker sports the Yeezy vibe, with comfort and innovation working hand in glove.

The Stone Salt adidas Yeezy 500 features an upper base of lightweight, breathable gray mesh that is padded at the collar for enhanced comfort. Overlays of premium leather and cow suede undulate across the upper in shades ranging from beige to gray. A mudguard crafted from abrasion-resistant beige-gray rubber adds both durability and aesthetic uniqueness to this upper. The adiPrene+ midsole is structured in light gray pods for ultimate cushioning and shock absorption. Completing the form and function of this shoe is a gray rubber abstract outsole that enhances comfort while offering traction.

The aspect of this shoe that we enjoy the most is the addition of Ortholite insoles. That extra touch of underfoot attention emphasizes how indulgently comfortable these sneakers are. The adidas Yeezy 500 Stone Salt was released on March 11, 2024, for $210 retail.

title: adidas Samba Jane Black White Gum (Women's)
adidas Yeezy Boost 350 V2 Carbon Beluga

red.description:
Just in time for summer adidas and Kanye West delivered the Yeezy Boost 350 V2 Carbon Beluga, a revamped version of the classic Beluga colorway. The iconic partnership continues to defy expectations and redefine sneaker culture.

With the Carbon Beluga colorway, this drop showcased a fresh take on the beloved Beluga. The Primeknit upper wrapped around the Boost midsole is swathed in this cutting-edge colorway, infusing a familiar design with bold, modern energy. It screams street-ready while maintaining that sleek Yeezy aesthetic we all know and love. This is a sneaker that not only speaks to your style but also pushes it to new levels.

The adidas Yeezy Boost 350 V2 Carbon Beluga stomped onto the scene on May 31, 2023, with a retail price of $230.

other.description:
The Yeezy Slide in Azure hit the scene on May 31, 2023. Born from the innovative partnership of adidas and Yeezy, reshaping the way we see casual footwear. These slides have it all - style, comfort, and a nod to the bold.

Adorned in a vibrant Azure hue, they are a celebration of color and a symbol of fearless style. The sleek EVA foam design offers more than just a unique aesthetic. It provides comfort that complements your daily hustle or chill out sessions equally. It's more than a slide. It's a statement. It's an ethos that embraces individuality and blurs the line between loungewear and streetwear.

With the adidas Yeezy Slide Azure, released at a retail price of $70, stepping into style has never been this effortless.

title: adidas Samba OG Black White Gum

white.description:
The adidas Samba Black-White Gum shoe, style B75807, is a product made from kangaroo leather with an innovative lightweight upper and gum rubber sole for grip. It features adidas stripes on its sides.

Of course, as their name suggests, the shoes are black and cloud-white and come with white or black shoelaces made of polyester and plastic. adidas Samba Black-White Gum’s tongue is branded with the adidas logo. Samba branding is just beneath the collar, close to the stripes on the sides of the sneakers.

The adidas Samba OG Black White Gum was originally released on January 6, 2018 at a retail price of $80, and now sits at a retail price of $100.

title: adidas Yeezy Foam RNR MX Granite

red.description:
All of the different slides and slip-ons that Kanye West has created as part of his partnership with adidas feature outside-the-box designs. The adidas Yeezy Foam RNR MX Granite is one of the most creative options that Kanye came up with during the adidas x Yeezy collaboration.

This slip-on shoe features a single piece of EVA foam that has been carefully crafted to be both aesthetically pleasing and breathable for functionality. It includes a number of sculpted lines that give it an unorthodox appearance, while also delivering as much airflow as possible when the slip-on is worn. It's designed for maximum comfort, too, thanks to its textured footbed and contoured heel that help keep feet in place.

But according to our experts, the best part about this slip-on might just be its grey "MX Granite" colorway that has a camo-like feel to it. It adds one more cool touch to a modern take on the classic slip-on design. The adidas Yeezy Foam RNR MX Granite was released on March 15, 2024, for a retail price of $90.

title: adidas Samba Jane White Black Gum (Women's)

white.description:
The adidas Campus 00s Core Black was launched as part of the sports collection sneakers in the adidas brand.

The adidas Campus 00s Core Black is covered in core black and white colorways at the upper, footwear white midsole, and brown outsole. This sneaker is a product of suede, rubber, and leather materials that completes the texture. The adidas Campus 00s Core Black features the adidas logo on the tongue and the heel with campus branding at its quarter.

The adidas Campus 00s Core Black got released at a suggested retail price of $100 on February 17, 2023.

title: adidas Samba Jane Scarlet White Gum (Women's)
adidas Yeezy Boost 350 V2 Dazzling Blue

black.description:
The adidas Yeezy 350 V2 Dazzling Blue is reminiscent of the 2016 Yeezy 350 V2 Black Friday Pack. Instead of featuring a marbled pattern and sheer side stripe, it opts for a solid black Primeknit upper and blue side stripe with "SPLY-350" text. At the base, a muted Boost sole offers comfort and support.

The adidas Yeezy 350 V2 Dazzling Blue released in February of 2022 and retailed for $220.

title: adidas Samba OG Cloud White Core Black (Women's)

white.description:
The adidas Samba OG Cloud White Core Black (Women's) represents a contemporary take on a timeless style, emanating an aesthetic charm that goes beyond its original athletic purpose.

Crafted from full-grain leather, the upper of the Cloud White Core Black adidas Samba OG (Women's) offers a sturdy and resilient construction. A light brown suede, paired with a contrasting dark brown heel tab, introduces an element of sophistication to the overall design. The iconic serrated 3-Stripes appear in a deep brown shade on both the lateral and medial sides, creating a visually striking contrast. Enhancing the shoe's unique identity, a Bluebird tongue label and a foil logotype mark its distinctive DNA. Underneath, a brown gum rubber outsole ensures both traction and durability, underscoring the shoe's practicality and style.

The standout characteristic of the adidas Samba OG Cloud White Core Black (Women's) lies in its signature T-toe design. This element pays homage to football pitches of the past, while embracing a forward-looking approach with its entirely vegan composition. The shoe debuted for $100 on December 1st, 2023.

other.description:
DISCLAIMER: US and UK sizing is the same and does not require any conversion.
The adidas Yeezy Slide Bone (Restock Pair) features a slightly different composition than the original adidas Yeezy Slide Bone that debuted in the fall of 2019. Instead of a smooth EVA foam construction, it has a pebbled, more textural touch. At the base, a grooved sole and cushioned footbed completes the design.

The adidas Yeezy Slide Bone (Restock Pair) released in May of 2022 and retailed for $60.

To shop the original adidas Yeezy Slide Bone, click here.

title: adidas BW Army Lux White Gum

white.description:
The adidas BW Army Lux White Gum is a casual lifestyle sneaker. The upper is constructed with Footwear White leather for the underlays and quarter, heel, and lace panel overlays. The tip continues the monochrome aesthetic while differentiating the texture in Footwear White suede. The Gum rubber mid- and outsole unit displays adidas Trefoil branding, which balances the monochrome Footwear White laces and tongue branding.

Founded in 1924, Germany-based adidas is one of the world’s most prolific sneaker brands. With the ability to mine their century-plus worth of archives, adidas excels at reintroducing historic styles, such as the BW Army. It was originally called the German Army Trainer, and the shoe's classic styling complements adidas' modern reinterpretation well.

Our experts feel that the best feature of the BW Army Lux is its classic Footwear White color palette, which is timeless and subtle. The adidas BW Army Lux White Gum was released on April 1, 2025, and retailed at $120.

black.description:
The Yeezy 700 Boost Wave Runner is the shoe that led Yeezy's pivot from a sleek, minimal aesthetic to a chunky, 90s inspired one. This was the gateway sneaker between knit runners like the 350 and the grungy skate look of the 550. The Yeezy 700 Wave Runner features a grey mesh and leather upper with black suede overlays and teal mesh underlays. At the base, a thick Boost sole and contrasting hits of orange complete the design.

The adidas Yeezy Boost 700 Wave Runner originally released in November of 2017, and most recently re-released in March of 2022 for a retail price of $300.

red.description:
The adidas Yeezy Slide redefines cozy footwear, this time in the fresh Granite colorway. Released on August 25, 2023, the Yeezy slide continues to prove that less truly is more. Drawing inspiration from modern design the Yeezy Slide's aesthetic is top-tier.
​​
​Molded with a smooth, soft-to-touch finish, the sculpted look elevates every casual outfit. Ditching the conventional, this slide is made from slick, EVA and rubber, creating a one-piece design that graces the entire silhouette. The neutral granite hue is minimalistic perfection, blending effortlessly with every style and season.​
​​
​Highlighting the contoured footbed for that ultra-comfort feeling, it's all about slipping into luxury and making a statement. Whether it's beach days or city strolls, elevate the vibe with these slides. The adidas Yeezy Slide in Granite made its mark on August 25, 2023, with an attainable retail price of $70.

title: adidas Yeezy Foam RNR MX Cinder

other.description:
The adidas Yeezy Foam RNNR MX Cinder is where high fashion meets innovative comfort. Wrapped in a MX Cinder colorway, this pair offers a unique combination of dark, earthy hues, giving it a versatile appeal that's equal parts streetwear-ready and avant-garde.

Constructed with a unique foam compound, the Yeezy Foam RNNR conforms to your foot for unparalleled comfort, while its distinctive, porous design gives off an out-of-this-world vibe. This sneaker pushes the boundaries of traditional footwear aesthetics and function, making it a must-have for trendsetters.With a fashion-forward design, the adidas Yeezy Foam RNNR MX Cinder not only elevates your style but promises ultimate comfort in every step. Take your sneaker game into the future.

The adidas Yeezy Foam RNNR MX Cinder released on May 31, 2023, with a retail price of $90.

The adidas Yeezy Foam RNR Carbon, released on August 8, 2023, continues to push the boundaries of sneaker design.

adidas utilized a robust blend of foam and rubber to construct the Yeezy Foam RNR, exhibiting a slick aesthetic in a striking Carbon colorway. The shoe's innovative one-piece design delivers unparalleled comfort, while strategic perforations ensure superior breathability. This isn't just footwear, it's a nod to the relentless innovation that defines the Yeezy brand.

Bold, and supremely comfortable, the adidas Yeezy Foam RNR Carbon was introduced on August 8, 2023, at a retail price of $80.

black.description:
The adidas Yeezy 700 V3 Dark Glow features a black Primeknit upper with a black TPU cage that glows vivid blue when exposed to the dark. From there, an EVA foam sole adds support for a cushioned fit.

The adidas Yeezy 700 V3 Dark Glow released in August of 2021 and retailed for $200.

title: adidas Samba OG Maroon Gold Metallic (Women's)

white.description:
The adidas Samba OG Maroon Gold Metallic (Women's) takes the classic Samba silhouette design and applies a rich colorway of maroon with Metallic Gold details.

The upper construction boasts smooth leather in maroon, while the toecap is made of soft suede in tonal maroon. The difference in textures creates subtle contrast and a luxury feel. The signature serrated 3-Stripes logo on the side panels is made of white leather. ‘SAMBA’ in Metallic Gold lettering runs along the 3-Stripes logo on the lateral side panel and complements the gold adidas logo printed on the tongue tag. Both the tongue and heel collar come in Cream White, which adds to the sneaker’s vintage appeal.

Our experts at StockX like the use of gum rubber on the durable outsole. The women’s size adidas Samba OG Maroon Gold Metallic (Women's) was released on February 9th, 2024, and retailed at $100.

Debuted in 2017, the adidas Yeezy Boost 350 V2 Zebra is known as one of the most renowned colorways in the Yeezy line. It features a white and black marbled Primeknit upper with a white side-stripe and red "SPLY-350" text. At the base, a cushioned Boost sole provides comfort and support.

The adidas Yeezy Boost 350 V2 Zebra released in February of 2017 and retailed for $220.

title: adidas Ultra Boost 1.0 DNA Triple White

white.description:
The adidas Ultra Boost 1.0 DNA Triple White takes on a monochromatic design, dressed in Cloud White from heel to toe, featuring adidas signature technologies, including PRIMEKNIT and Boost.

The Triple White adidas Ultra Boost 1.0 DNA upper is made of PRIMEKNIT material, which gives it a lightweight and breathable feel. The midsole features adidas’ Boost technology, ensuring support and comfort. Underfoot, the Stretchweb outsole flexes naturally, while the Continental™ rubber outsole provides traction and grip. For brand recognition, the sneaker features the iconic 3-Stripes on the lateral and medial sides, with an adidas logo on the tongue tag. With a lace closure for a secure fit, this shoe provides both comfort and an eco-conscious design.

What stands out in the adidas Ultra Boost 1.0 DNA Triple White is its commitment to sustainability, as its upper incorporates a high-performance yarn made from at least 50% Parley Ocean Plastic, repurposed from plastic waste intercepted in remote coastal areas and shorelines, preventing ocean pollution. The remaining 50% of the yarn is recycled polyester. The shoe was released on January 1st, 2023, for $200.

title: adidas Samba OG Cream White Sand Strata (Women's)

white.description:
The adidas Samba OG Cream White Sand Strata (Women's) updates the classic Samba silhouette with a straightforward colorway and premium materials.

Although the base color is Cream White, Sand Strata and Core Black add to the sneaker’s retro appearance. Originally an indoor soccer shoe, the Samba OG Sand Strata Cream White features a rubber outsole that provides traction without reducing flexibility. The upper is made of premium leather in Cream White with suede overlays in Sand Strata. The laces, the serrated 3-Stripes, and the collar come in Core Black. In terms of branding, ‘SAMBA’ is printed along the 3-Stripes in Metallic Gold lettering, while the trefoil in gold can be found on the tongue’s logo tag.

Our experts at StockX appreciate the inclusion of metallic elements in a way that doesn’t overwhelm the shoe. The women’s size adidas Samba OG Cream White Sand Strata (Women's) was released on January 10th, 2024, and retailed at $100.

red.description:
Enter the realm of sleek minimalism with the adidas Yeezy Slide Salt, a silhouette that redefines casual footwear. Embracing a monochromatic salt hue, this slide is a testament to the idea that true sophistication lies in simplicity. Designed with a smooth, seamless construction, the Yeezy Slide Salt offers an uncluttered, organic aesthetic that's as tranquil as its namesake.

The Yeezy Slide in Salt is crafted from a unique foam compound that blends lightweight comfort with durability, these slides are tailored for the trendsetters who seek to merge their laid-back lifestyles with high-fashion sensibilities. The soft, cushioned footbed conforms to your foot, making every step feel like a cloud—a testament to adidas and Yeezy's pursuit of innovation in comfort and design.

Having graced the market on March 15, 2024, and with a price tag of $70, the adidas Yeezy Slide Salt swiftly became the go-to choice for those who covet a fusion of luxe and leisure. Its release is celebrated as the moment when adidas and Yeezy once again elevated the everyday to the extraordinary. For the aficionados of minimalist chic, the adidas Yeezy Slide Salt has set a new benchmark in effortless style.

other.description:
The adidas Yeezy Desert Boot Salt, Influenced by military and utility design, was made available as part of Season 7 lineup collection.

This version was made of breathable mesh, suede, and nubuck with a Salt color palette. Its disassembled design lines are reminiscent of the 500 sneakers. Rubber outsoles are .finished in complementary colors. A 3M fluorescent nylon pull tab runs the entire length of the tongue's spine. A thick foam midsole with EVA cushioning and a serrated rubber outsole, both of which take on tonal colors dependent on the upper, complete the overall design.

The adidas Yeezy Desert Boot Salt first debuted on 14 September 2019 and retailed at $200.

white.description: Step into style with the adidas Samba OG Cow Print, a playful twist on the classic silhouette designed exclusively for women. This eye-catching sneaker features a unique cow print pattern on the upper, blending dark brown and off-white hues for a bold, fashion-forward look. The iconic gum 3 outsole provides excellent traction and durability, while staying true to the Samba's timeless aesthetic. The Samba OG Cow Print combines comfort and style effortlessly. Its soft leather upper offers a premium feel and excellent support, while the cushioned insole ensures all-day comfort. The signature T-toe overlay and serrated 3-Stripes maintain the shoe's classic appeal, making it a versatile option for both casual wear and statement-making outfits. Us at StockX believe this product is great for fashion-conscious individuals looking to add a unique, conversation-starting piece to their sneaker collection.

title: adidas Yeezy Boost 350 V2 Black Red

black.description:
The adidas Yeezy Boost 350 V2 Black Red is one of the first original colorways to drop after the silouhette’s debut in 2016. Despite its original 2017 release, the 350 V2 Black Red restocked in 2020, giving fans a second chance at grabbing a pair at retail.

The adidas Yeezy 350 V2 Black Red features familiar style cues that made the silhouette popular today. The upper consists of black Primeknit material for breathability. A black ribbed midsole encases an entire BOOST cushioning system for added comfort. Lastly, signature "SPLY-350" is knitted along the lateral side of each pair.

The adidas Yeezy 350 V2 originally released in February of 2017 and retailed for $220.

PLEASE NOTE: This page is for the original and restock, so production dates may vary.

white.description:
The Nike Air Force 1 Low White ‘07 features an all-white leather upper with a perforated toe box and Swoosh overlays. A Nike heel embroidery and white sole completes the design.

The Nike Air Force 1 Low White ‘07 originally released in 2007, but since it is an essential colorway to the brand, it consistently restocks.

To shop all Nike Air Force 1 shoes, click here.

The Nike P-6000 Metallic Silver takes its inspiration from the Air Pegasus of 2006 and reimagines it with space-age details to give this sneaker a futuristic look.

The Metallic Silver Nike P-6000 features an upper base crafted from breathable metallic fabric. Both vertical and horizontal overlays are constructed of chrome synthetic leather course across the upper, making it glisten. A silver side-panel Nike swoosh is outlined in black embroidery that connects with the black foxing and black Nike branding on the tongue tag and heel tab. The white laces match the tongue, sock liner, and insole with P-6000 branding in black. A miniature black Nike swoosh adorns the toe box.

One of our favorite aspects of this sneaker is the comfortable and dependable sole unit. Cushioning white foam in the midsole works with a durable black outsole that provides traction for everyday wear. The Nike P-6000 Metallic Silver was released on October 6, 2023, for $120 retail.

red.description:
The Nike Kobe 6 Protro Total Orange is a powerful tribute to Kobe Bryant’s commitment to the game, especially his vocal support for women’s basketball. Inspired by the iconic moment Kobe sat courtside in a WNBA hoodie, this colorway brings high-impact energy through a bold mix of total orange, cosmic clay, and metallic silver. With its scaly upper and low-cut profile, the sneaker fuses the Mamba mentality with a design built for sharp movement and statement style.

On the court, it performs as good as it looks. The updated Protro build keeps things fast and low with responsive foam and an Air Zoom Turbo unit in the forefoot for explosive push-off. A translucent rubber outsole and low-profile traction give you control without bulk, while the inner fit system keeps you locked in through every cut and drive. Metallic silver hits on the Swoosh and heel bring just enough shine to balance the fiery upper.

Released on July 18, 2025, the Nike Kobe 6 Protro Total Orange dropped at a retail price of $190. Its total orange, metallic silver, and cosmic clay colorway is a lasting reminder of Kobe’s legacy and his influence beyond the game. Whether you’re hooping or collecting, this one delivers history and heat in one shot.

title: Nike Dunk Low Retro White Black Panda

white.description:
From the school-spirited College Colors Program to the vibrant Nike CO.JP collection, Nike Dunks have seen many colorways since the design’s inception in 1985. But with each new colorway, the Dunk’s classic color-blocking has remained in some capacity. Nike put its timeless color-blocking to work with the Nike Dunk Low Retro White Black.

The upper Nike Dunk Low Retro White Black is constructed of white leather with black leather overlays and Swooshes. Classic Nike branding is featured on the nylon tongue, nodding to traditional Dunk design elements. A white midsole and black outsole complete the design.

The Nike Dunk Low Retro White Black released in January of 2021 and retailed for $100.

To shop all Nike Dunks, click here.

title: Nike SB Dunk Low Supreme 94 Black

white.description:
The Nike Kobe 6 Protro Dodgers pays tribute to the city of Los Angeles and its storied sports culture, blending Kobe Bryant’s legendary basketball legacy with the iconic colors of the Dodgers. This sleek sneaker features a game royal snakeskin-textured upper, accented with white midsoles and red jersey-style number 8 detailing on the lateral ankle. The baseball-inspired stitching on the tongue ties the theme together, making this pair a standout tribute to both Kobe and LA’s baseball dynasty.

Designed for performance and style, the Kobe 6 Protro Dodgers retains the responsive Zoom Air cushioning and lightweight build that made the original a go-to on the court. Whether you’re playing ball or rocking them casually, the combination of storytelling and signature Protro upgrades ensures a perfect balance of comfort and durability. The shoe’s sleek silhouette and city-inspired details make it a must-have for both Lakers and Dodgers fans alike.

Released on May 30, 2025, for a retail price of $190, the Nike Kobe 6 Protro Dodgers celebrates the deep connection between Kobe Bryant and Los Angeles sports culture. With its nods to baseball and basketball history, this release is a true collector’s item.

title: Nike SB Dunk Low Supreme 94 Ocean Fog
Nike Air Force 1 Low Supreme Black

black.description:
Supreme and Nike paid homage to an NYC classic with the release of the Nike Air Force 1 Low Supreme Black, now available on StockX. This collaboration adds Supreme’s world-renowned Box Logo to the side of a traditional all-black Air Force 1 design.

This Air Force 1 Low is comprised of an all-black leather upper with matching soles and detailing. A red Supreme Box Logo placed on the outside heel completes the design. These sneakers released in March of 2020 and retailed for $118.

title: Nike Air Max 90 Grateful Dead University of Oregon Grateful Ducks

red.description:
This Nike Kobe 8 Protro What The (2025) revives one of the most iconic and eclectic designs in the Kobe signature series. Staying true to the "What The" theme, this sneaker mashes up multiple iconic Kobe 8 colorways into one bold, eye-catching design. With mismatched color palettes on each shoe and a blend of graphics, materials, and prints, this release celebrates the rich legacy of Kobe Bryant’s eighth signature model.

Built with a lightweight engineered mesh upper, superior cushioning, and a low-profile silhouette, the Kobe 8 Protro remains one of the most performance-driven basketball sneakers to date. The combination of bold hues, reflective details, and oversized branding makes this sneaker stand out both on and off the court.

black.description:
The all-black Air Force 1 Low is a timeless classic in Nike's catalog of heritage sneakers.

The Nike Air Force 1 Low '07 Black features a triple black smooth leather upper with a matching Air sole and laces. Subtle Nike Air embroidery on the heel tab nods to the history of the AF-1 line. A metallic lace tag and woven tongue label complete the design.

The Nike Air Force 1 Low '07 retails for $115.

title: Nike SB Dunk Low Supreme 94 White Metallic Silver
Nike Air Force 1 Low Supreme White

white.description:
Supreme and Nike paid homage to an NYC classic with the release of the Nike Air Force 1 Low Supreme White, now available on StockX. This collaboration adds Supreme’s world-renowned Box Logo to the side of a traditional all-white Air Force 1 design.

This Air Force 1 Low is comprised of an all-white leather upper with matching soles and detailing. A red Supreme Box Logo placed on the outside heel completes the design. These sneakers released in March of 2020 and retailed for $118.

The Nike Hoops Elite 32L Backpack White/Gold/Black is a backpack designed to help you carry all your sports equipment with comfort and ease.

The white, gold, and black Nike Hoops Elite 32L Backpack is made mostly of recycled polyester. The top of the backpack is white with a gold Nike Swoosh on one side, while the middle and bottom of the backpack are black with gold accents. The shoulder straps are padded with air units for extra comfort and are adjustable. They also display gold Nike branding. There is a chest strap for extra support. The backpack has two side pockets as well as a top zipper, a back compartment, and a smaller front compartment.

What we like best about this backpack is the sheer number of zippered compartments it has, allowing for secure storage of all of your belongings. The Nike Hoops Elite 32L Backpack White/Gold/Black is part of the Summer Spring '24 collection and was released for a price of $87.

title: Nike Zoom Vomero 5 Photon Dust Metallic Silver (Women's)

red.description:
The Nike Zoom Vomero 5 Photon Dust Metallic Silver (W) comes in a Photon Dust, Chrome, Gridiron, and Sail color palette.

The Photon Dust Metallic Silver Nike Zoom Vomero 5 (W) features an upper made from breathable fabric, allowing for breathability and comfort. The shoe features Nike's Zoom Air cushioning technology, which provides responsive, energy-returning cushioning. The shoe also features a cushioned and supportive midsole made of soft foam. The sneaker has a TPU heel clip that provides stability and reduces the risk of slipping. The shoe's durable rubber outsole has a waffle pattern for traction. The shoe features a Nike Swoosh on the lateral sides, a "NIKE VOMERO 5" inscription on the tongue, and a small Swoosh on the heel.

The women’s rendition of the Nike Zoom Vomero 5 Photon Dust Metallic Silver (W) was released on March 1, 2023, and initially retailed for $160.

title: Nike Dunk Low Retro Khaki Team Red Pearl White (Women's)

white.description:
The Nike Zoom Vomero 5 Metallic Gold (Women’s) is a modern running shoe with a geometric design with metallic accents.

This version of the Nike Zoom Vomero 5 comes with a white mesh upper for breathability. The mesh is overlaid by both real and synthetic leather in different shades of white and gold. A matte metallic gold lines the toebox and heel, while shiny metallic gold runs up to the laces and midsole. The midsole features plastic gold caging for extra support. On top of this caging, you’ll find the Nike Swoosh in shiny gold. The Swoosh appears again on the heel, and the tongue contains a Nike Vomero 5 patch. The shoe is complete with Zoom Air cushioning and a rubber sole for traction.

What stands out about this shoe is the plastic gold caging added on the sides for extra support. The Nike Zoom Vomero 5 Metallic Gold (Women’s) was released on March 20, 2024, for a price of $160.

title: Nike Air Max 95 OG Big Bubble Blue Spark

red.description:
The Nike KD 17 NRG Aunt Pearl commemorates Kevin Durant's late aunt with its meaningful design and striking aesthetics. This edition continues the tradition of blending basketball performance with heartfelt storytelling, and combines unique materials and design elements in an unforgettable silhouette.

Aunt Pearl's version of the KD 17 NRG by Nike features a predominantly pink foam textile upper, accented with iridescent "KD" branding on the tongue and heel. Embroidered details on the heel overlay add depth and symbolize the emotional connection behind the design. The midsole integrates responsive Zoom Air cushioning in the forefoot, complemented by an Air Strobel unit in the heel. This shoe was introduced to honor Durant's aunt and raise awareness for cancer research.

One thing we love about the Nike KD 17 NRG Aunt Pearl is its intricate embroidery that honors Kevin Durant’s family legacy. Additionally, the cushioning system blends advanced Zoom Air and Air Strobel technology, which offers impressive performance. Released on 15th November 2024, this heartfelt design retailed at $150.

white.description:
The Nike Kobe 6 Protro Sail All-Star brings a fresh twist to an iconic silhouette. This edition stands out with its sail-dominated upper, offset by a striking black Swoosh and subtle platinum violet accents. Unlike previous versions of the Kobe 6, this release introduces a bold new starry pattern on the upper, replacing the signature snakeskin texture on the medial sides of the upper. This design choice not only elevates the shoe’s visual appeal but also nods to Kobe Bryant’s star power and celebrates the 2025 NBA all star weekend, making it a must-have for collectors and hoopers alike.

Further refining its look, the sneaker features light bone tones across the midsole and heel, creating a balanced contrast with the white outsole. The platinum violet lining adds a unique pop of color without overpowering the shoe’s clean aesthetic. Performance-wise, the Kobe 6 Protro maintains its low-cut profile and responsive cushioning, ensuring optimal comfort on and off the court. Whether styled casually or laced up for a game, this pair seamlessly merges function with fashion.

Released on February 13, 2025, the Nike Kobe 6 Protro Sail All-Star hit shelves at a retail price of $190, quickly becoming a sought-after addition to the Kobe lineup. Its refined blend of sail, black, light bone, white, and platinum violet gives it a timeless appeal, while the innovative design elements make it a standout among past iterations.

title: Nike Dunk Low Retro White Black Panda (Women's)

white.description:
The Nike Dunk Low White Black 2021 women’s sneaker features a white and black leather upper with perforations on the toe box. The base of the upper starts with white leather, and black leather wraps around it in an even pattern. A black Nike Swoosh logo adorns either side of the upper and wraps around the ankle to complete the design.

The Nike Dunk Low White Black 2021 women’s sneaker released in March of 2021 and retailed for $100.

To shop all Nike Dunks, click here.

black.description:
The Nike Hoops Elite 32L Backpack Black/Silver is a black backpack with silver accents from fashion and footwear brand Nike that helps keep all your things organized and close by.

This 32L roomy backpack presents in a black colorway, and there are metallic silver accents such as Nike Swoosh on the outside facing side as well as a graphic stripe on the main outside pouch. Whether using this backpack for school, work, or sports, you’ll be able to fit all your gear and daily essentials thanks to its large capacity. The Black/Silver Nike Hoops Elite 32L Backpack measurements are 19" (48 cm) in height, 11" (28 cm) in width, and 9" (23 cm) in depth. Other details include side pockets, interior mesh pockets, haul loops, and a chest strap.

Thanks to the air units on the shoulder straps of this sleek backpack, you can enjoy cushioning and comfort while carrying all your essentials, and they are this product’s unique feature. The Nike Hoops Elite 32L Backpack Black/Silver was released as part of Nike’s spring-summer 2024 collection.

title: Nike Air Max 95 Corteiz Honey Black

black.description:
The Nike Air Max 95 Corteiz Honey Black taps into bold energy with a rugged, tactical spin. Built atop a black leather upper with diamond-knit mesh, this pair leans into a utilitarian vibe that doesn’t sacrifice style. The layered netting, beefed-up tongue and collar, and toggle lacing system all serve up function and fashion in equal measure—perfect for those constantly on the move.

Corteiz brings its unmistakable signature to the collab, dropping in co-branded hits on the heel and tongue along with a slick Alcatraz logo. This isn’t just another streetwear drop—it’s a full-on campaign. The tour yellow Air Max units punch through the black midsole with energy, while the clean sockliner ditches camo for a glossy black finish, setting this iteration apart from previous releases. Designed for the streets but ready for anything, it’s a shoe that moves how you do.

The Nike Air Max 95 Corteiz Honey Black released on April 30, 2025, for $190. Featuring a black and tour yellow colorway, this collab carried forward Corteiz’s renegade approach to hype.

DISCLAIMER: Dust Bag is not required to pass verification.

The Nike P-6000 Black features a classic low-top silhouette presented in an all-black colorway.

The Black Nike P-6000 has an upper made from a combination of leather and mesh materials, ensuring durability and breathability. The shoe features a lace-up closure system that allows for a secure and customizable fit. The cushioned midsole provides comfort and shock absorption. Furthermore, the rubber outsole offers traction and grip, ensuring stability and control. The shoe also includes Nike branding details, including the trademark Nike Swoosh logo on the sides and the "NIKE" wordmark on the tongue.

What we love about this shoe is its sleek and modern design. The shoe features a mixture of leather and mesh materials, creating a dynamic and textured upper. The black colorway emphasizes the shoe's bold and statement-making appearance. In addition, the sneaker incorporates a chunky and supportive midsole, which enhances the shoe's overall aesthetic. The Nike P-6000 Black was released on June 28, 2019, at an initial price of $100.

title: Nike P-6000 White Metallic Silver Black

white.description: The Nike P-6000 White Metallic Silver Black is a striking addition to Nike's lineup of lifestyle sneakers. This model showcases a sleek design that seamlessly blends retro aesthetics with modern comfort. The upper features a clean white base, accented by metallic silver overlays that add a touch of sophistication. Black detailing on the Swoosh, heel, and outsole provides a bold contrast, creating a visually appealing balance. Engineered for both style and performance, the P-6000 boasts Nike's renowned cushioning technology, ensuring all-day comfort for wearers. The shoe's construction incorporates a mix of materials, including breathable mesh and durable leather, offering a premium feel and enhanced durability. With its versatile colorway and timeless silhouette, this sneaker effortlessly transitions from casual outings to more active pursuits. Us at StockX believe this product is great for those seeking a versatile sneaker that combines classic Nike design elements with contemporary comfort features.

black.description:
The Nike Vomero 5 Triple Black is part of Nike’s Vomero 5 lineup, which includes sneakers with a technical silhouette and a variety of function-first details.

The "Triple Black" comes with an all-black, mesh base and leather overlays. Like other editions of the Vomero 5, the sneaker features motifs of Bill Bowerman, a famous University of Oregon coach, on the insole. 3M reflective detailing along the overlays provides extra visibility during low lighting, while Zoom Air cushioning adds comfort and support. The sneaker’s all-black colorway makes it stand out from other versions of the Vomero 5 and gives the shoe a sleek appearance.

Something our experts love is the plastic heel counter. It features a grid-like design and complements the plastic paneling on the side of the sneaker. The Nike Vomero 5 Triple Black was released on July 20, 2023, and retailed at $160.

title: Nike Air Max 95 SB Cactus Flower
Nike Air Trainer Huarache Cool Blue Black
Nike Air VaporMax Plus Triple Black

white.description:
The Nike VaporMax Plus Triple Black is a combination of the Air Max Plus series, which was released in 1998, and the VaporMax series.

The Nike VaporMax Plus Triple Black has an upper construction of neoprene, true to the iconic look of the Nike Air Max Plus. The length of the Air Max sole extends through the entire sneaker. The tongue displays the Air Vapor Max Plus branding, and the VM logo is seen on the heel. The VM logo provides contrast through its yellow, white, and red colors. The heel is reminiscent of the Tuned Air Logo from 1998. Short white stripes run through the upper part of the Nike VaporMax complete the design.

The Nike Air VaporMax Plus Triple Black released in January of 2018 and retailed for $190.

title: Nike Air Max Muscle 95 Yu-Gi-Oh! Joey (with Promo Card)
Nike Vapor Edge 360 Untouchable Mid Black White

white.description:
The Nike Vapor Edge 360 Untouchable Mid Black White (W) sneaker combines a sleek black body with contrasting white lace features and the iconic white Swoosh logo on both the side and toe. The black undertread features a third white Swoosh.

Launched as part of Nike’s Vapor Edge line, originally released ahead of Super Bowl LIV to bring soccer‑inspired speed tech to football. The mid-height profile silhouette, complete with sock ankle support, features internal bracing. Underfoot, the signature Vapor Edge 360 plate delivers 360-degree traction.

What our team loves most about the shoe is the Flyknit wrap, which provides a snug fit and lightweight support. Its glossy sheen adds elegance to the sleek design. The gray eyelet details and predominantly black colorway create a minimalist look. The Nike Vapor Edge 360 Untouchable Mid Black White was released on June 30, 2025, with a retail price of $190.

title: Nike SB Dunk Low Supreme 94 Ink

black.description:
The Nike ReactX Rejuven8 Triple Black is the definition of sleek and effortless style. Dressed entirely in black, this slip-on is crafted for both comfort and versatility. Its lightweight, breathable upper features a wavy, textured design, while strategically placed ventilation holes help keep feet cool throughout the day.

Built with Nike’s ReactX cushioning, this silhouette provides superior comfort, making it ideal for long hours on your feet. The slip-on construction ensures easy wear, while the durable rubber outsole delivers excellent grip. Whether you’re looking for a stylish everyday sneaker or a recovery shoe, this all-black design blends seamlessly into any wardrobe.

Releasing on January 29, 2025, the Nike ReactX Rejuven8 Triple Black retailed for $70. With its combination of comfort and monochrome aesthetics, this sneaker is perfect for those who appreciate a refined yet functional look.

title: NikeCraft Mars Yard Shoe 3.0 Tom Sachs Space Camp
Nike Kobe 9 Elite Low Protro Michael Jackson Moonwalker (2025)

white.description:
The Nike Kobe 9 Elite Low Protro "Moonwalker" (2025) channels performance and pop-culture energy in equal measure. Draped in hyper grape, white and cave purple, the Flyknit upper commands attention and the metallic silver Swoosh glints like stage lights on the King of Pop. A low-cut collar keeps things sleek, while the black and purple midsole bridges court-ready tech with bold aesthetic.

On the technical side, the "Moonwalker" edition doesn’t play it safe: it’s upgraded with React foam cushioning, a carbon-fiber plate for stability, and a translucent outsole embedding a moonrock graphic, a subtle nod to the legendary moonwalk. Every element works to deliver both story and serious performance.

When the Nike Kobe 9 Elite Low Protro "Moonwalker" dropped, it retailed for $220 and arrived on October 30, 2025. It’s one of those releases where pop culture and innovation meet—a court-ready silhouette that doubles as a standout piece in any rotation.

title: Puma LaMelo Ball LaFrancé Amour Moment

red.description:
The Puma LaMelo Ball LaFrancé Amour Moment is an all-over-beige addition to NBA player LaMelo Ball’s signature LaFrancé lifestyle fashion label and Puma.

Incorporating elements from streetwear fashion and sportswear, this sneaker, the Moment Puma LaMelo Ball LaFrancé Amour, boasts an exaggerated silhouette with oversized cotton laces and chunky padding in the collar. The earth-toned Alpine Snow colorway complements the splashes of cream across the upper and lets the overlapping upper design take center stage. The internal EVA midsole stretches the entire length of the shoe, while the rubber cupsole adds stability. LaFrancé lettering in a light-brown hue can be found underfoot, on the tongue, and on the heel’s pull tab. Although the upper is crafted from leather and textile, the inner lining is made from a lightweight synthetic material.

Our experts like the textured outsole, which displays Puma and LaFrancé branding in gothic, graffiti-inspired lettering. The Puma LaMelo Ball LaFrancé Amour Moment was released on July 19, 2024, and sold for $110.

title: Puma LaMelo Ball LaFrancé Amour Black

black.description: The Puma LaMelo Ball LaFrancé Amour Black is a striking addition to the basketball star's signature line. This sleek sneaker showcases a predominantly black colorway, exuding a bold and sophisticated aesthetic. The design seamlessly blends style and performance, featuring Puma's innovative technology to enhance on-court agility and comfort. With its eye-catching silhouette and premium materials, this shoe is set to make a statement both on and off the hardwood. LaMelo Ball's influence is evident in every aspect of this shoe, from its unique name to its cutting-edge design elements. The LaFrancé Amour incorporates advanced cushioning and support systems, ensuring optimal performance during intense gameplay. Its versatile appearance makes it equally suitable for casual wear, allowing fans to showcase their appreciation for LaMelo's distinctive style in everyday settings. Set for release on March 12, 2025, this highly anticipated sneaker is poised to become a must-have for basketball enthusiasts and sneakerheads alike. Us at StockX believe this product is great for athletes seeking a high-performance basketball shoe that doubles as a stylish streetwear option.

white.description:
The Puma Speedcat OG Red White is a bold performance shoe made for speed whose design was inspired by the racetrack.
  
The Red White Puma Speedcat OG has a lightweight paneled leather upper in Puma's bold For All Time Red color. A red leather overlay forms the toe cap, which also bears a white Puma logo on the outer side. White suede Puma Formstrip racing stripes appear on each side of the shoe above the red heel panel, while the Puma brand name and logo appear in metallic-gold letters on the outer side right above it. The tongue and heel also feature metallic-gold Puma branding. The rubber outsole is black and patterned for traction. 
 
What we like best about this sneaker is the slim design that truly supports the speed-enhancing features. The Puma Speedcat OG Red White was first released on June 29, 2024, for an original price of $120.

The Puma Speedcat OG Black White dresses this classic low-top sneaker from the early 2000s in a straightforward colorway of black and white.

Inspired by motorsports and Puma’s apparel partnerships with several F1 teams, this lifestyle shoe boasts a sleek, slim-fitting silhouette. The upper is crafted from premium suede in black with the signature formstrip in white reaching across the side panels. In addition, the Black White Puma Speedcat OG showcases subtle Puma branding, including ‘PUMA’ in metallic gold lettering on the lateral side panel and the tongue, and a white Jumping Cat logo on the toebox. The thin, rubber outsole comes in black and offers traction underfoot, while the black laces secure the closure.

Our experts like the sneaker’s overall premium feel created by the metallic gold accents set against the velvety suede upper. The Puma Speedcat OG Black White was released on June 29, 2024, and sold for $120.

title: Puma LaMelo Ball MB.04 Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles Raphael & Donatello

red.description:
The Puma LaMelo Ball MB.04 Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles Raphael & Donatello is an asymmetrical athletic shoe pair featuring the left shoe in Fluro Green and Dark Amethyst and the right shoe in Fluro Green and PUMA Red. Fluro Green’s illustrative placement encases the tip and midsole, dispersing into LOVE text and sword imagery. Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles, M.E.L.O., and Puma branding appear on the rear heel. 

In collaboration with NBA player LaMelo Ball of the Charlotte Hornets, German brand Puma indulged Ball’s affinity for Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles, the film, comic, and TV series about evil-fighting turtle brothers in New York City. Each turtle brother gets his shoe within the collection, and the MB.04 features Raphael and Donatello.

Our experts feel that the best feature of the Puma LaMelo Ball MB.04 is its intricate design, which is loaded with Ninja Turtles references. The Puma LaMelo Ball MB.04 Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles Raphael & Donatello was released on February 8, 2025, and retailed at $135.

blue.description:
The Puma LaMelo Ball MB.04 Scooby-Doo is a playful and eye-catching collaboration that brings the beloved cartoon character to life on a performance basketball shoe. This unique design features a vibrant aquatic blue upper with lime green and fiery orange accents, perfectly capturing the essence of the Mystery Machine and its iconic crew. The sneaker's bold colorway is complemented by subtle Scooby-Doo themed details, making it a standout piece for both fans of the animated series and sneaker enthusiasts alike.

Designed for optimal on-court performance, the MB.04 incorporates Puma's latest technology to enhance comfort, support, and responsiveness. The shoe's lightweight construction and responsive cushioning system cater to LaMelo Ball's dynamic playing style, providing excellent traction and stability for quick cuts and explosive movements. With its blend of nostalgia and cutting-edge design, the Puma LaMelo Ball MB.04 Scooby-Doo offers a perfect balance of style and functionality. Us at StockX believe this product is great for basketball players looking to make a statement on the court while enjoying superior performance and comfort.

The Puma LaMelo Ball MB.04 Iridescent is a basketball shoe that was designed as part of a partnership with American basketball star LaMelo Ball.
       
This version of the LaMelo Ball MB.04 by Puma has a breathable textile base that appears in Deep Orchid blue. Synthetic overlays in different shades of bold pink start at the toe box and snake up and around the upper containing the words "Love," "Rare," and "1 of One." Dark blue overlays also undercut the pink on each side. 1 of One branding is also seen on the tongue on top of the phoenix wearing a halo, and the blue heel contains a blue and pink bee character. The EVA midsole allows for energy return and comfort during play. 

What we like best about this shoe is the way the overlays resemble flames while still forming the branding elements. The Puma LaMelo Ball MB.04 Iridescent was first released on November 15, 2024, and originally sold for $125.

title: Puma LaMelo Ball LaFrancé Amour 3x Black
Puma LaMelo Ball MB.04 Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles Leonardo & Michelangelo
Puma Speedcat OG Haute Coffee Frosted Ivory (Gold Tongue Logo)
Puma Suede One Piece Straw Hat Luffy

grey.description:
The Puma Suede One Piece Straw Hat Luffy sneaker is a vibrant homage to the beloved protagonist of the iconic anime series, One Piece. Dressed in shades of feather grey and platinum grey, this sneaker captures the spirit of adventure and determination that Luffy embodies. Designed for fans who carry the essence of exploration and the dream of finding their own "One Piece," this edition marries the timeless appeal of Puma Suede with the adventurous heart of the Straw Hat crew.

Luffy, known for his unwavering resolve and charismatic leadership, inspires the design of this sneaker. The color palette, though understated, reflects the simplicity and depth of Luffy's character, offering a versatile look that can accompany fans on their own quests and daily adventures. The sneaker features subtle nods to the One Piece series that resonate with fans, making it a wearable piece of the saga they cherish.

Launched on March 23, 2024, for $85, the Puma Suede One Piece Straw Hat Luffy quickly sailed into the hearts of sneaker collectors and anime enthusiasts alike. Its release is celebrated as a moment when the paths of fashion and anime crossed, creating a sneaker that's not only a testament to Luffy's journey but also an invitation to wearers to set sail on their own adventures. This sneaker is a symbol of the journey, friendship, and dreams that define One Piece.

title: Puma Speedcat Ballet Black Mauve Mist (Women's)

black.description:
The Puma Speedcat Ballet Black Mauve Mist (Women's) is an iteration of the late 90s Puma Speedcat, blending ballet aesthetics with car racing heritage. This women's-sized rendition of a classic goes beyond the F1 racetrack and enters the realm of dance.

The Puma Speedcat Ballet showcases a matte-black suede upper with a soft pink lateral Formstrip. Sticking to Puma's sports heritage, the toe panel gets an embroidered cat logo, matching the debossed emblem on the heel. Unlike the original Speedcat, which features a padded tongue and lacing system, this ballet version features four elastic bands over the midfoot, mimicking ballet shoes. An Ortholite insole provides cushioning and shock absorption, supported by a tire-tread rubber outsole.

Something we love about the Puma Speedcat Ballet Black Mauve Mist (Women's) is how it blends the race-ready DNA of the classic Speedcat with the soft, graceful aesthetic of ballet, resulting in a sporty and chic shoe. The women's shoe debuted on March 1, 2025, for $80.

white.description:
The Puma Speedcat Ballet Silver (Women's) presents a low‑profile metallic silver upper with signature Formstrip, elastic instep bands, and embroidered PUMA cat logo, white accents, seated on a lightweight rubber outsole for traction.

The Silver Speedcat Ballet (Women's) by Puma combines a metallic upper with satin‑finish elastic instep bands and embroidered cat logos near the heel and toe. It Shows off a white Formstrip along the lateral side and tonal stitching throughout. The interior lining uses breathable textiles, while the low‑cut silhouette merges Formula 1‑informed DNA with ballet‑inspired updates and rests on a rubber outsole for traction. Puma was founded in 1949 by Rudolf Dassler.

One of the things we, the experts, appreciate about The Puma Speedcat Ballet Silver (Women's) is its slip‑on design with elastic instep bands for easy on‑off transitions and lightweight feel, as well as the OrthoLite® sockliner for consistent underfoot cushioning during extended wear on indoor floors or studio sessions. It retailed at $80 when it was released on the 1st of March 2025.

title: Puma Speedcat TTF Dark Chocolate Frosted Ivory
Puma Speedcat OG New Navy Warm White

red.description:
The Puma LaMelo Ball MB.03 Miami is a brightly colored basketball shoe designed as a collaboration with American basketball star LaMelo Ball.

The Miami Puma LaMelo Ball MB.03 has an engineered mesh upper as its base in a bright-pink color. This is visible through ragged scratches in the overlays on each side. Synthetic overlays in teal with pink swirls adorn most of the upper from the toe to the heel. The cushioned heel area is Teal with Puma, Melo, 111 and 01ofOne branding in pink, while the tongue bears the words "Rare" and "Fear" in pink. The shoe sits on a thick teal textured midsole that bleeds into the design of the upper.

What we like best about this shoe is the pink swirl pattern across the overlays on the upper, which allows the shoe to stand out. The Puma LaMelo Ball MB.03 Miami was released on July 5, 2024, for $125.

title: Puma LaMelo Ball LaFrancé Amour Red

red.description:
The Puma LaMelo Ball LaFrancé Amour For All Time Red is part of the Puma x LaFrancé collaboration, which expresses NBA player LaMelo Ball’s personal style through the exaggerated silhouettes LaFrancé is known for.

Like other footwear in the collection, the For All Time Red Puma LaMelo Ball LaFrancé Amour features an all-over red colorway of For All Time Red. Reminiscent of Y2K fashion, thick padding in the collar and side panels gives the sneaker a chunky aesthetic. The upper boasts a durable canvas base with overlays in shiny patent leather. The full-length internal EVA midsole adds cushioning, while the fully wrapped rubber cupsole provides stability. The midsole and outsole display branding specific to LaMelo Ball and ‘LaFrancé’ provides the traction pattern underfoot.

Our StockX experts like the oversized, red laces, which match LaFrancé’s preference for exaggerated proportions. The Puma LaMelo Ball LaFrancé Amour For All Time Red was released on May 17, 2024, and sold for $120.

title: Puma Speedcat Go Chocolate Alpine Snow (Women's)
Puma LaMelo Ball MB.04 Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles Raphael and Donatello (GS)
Puma Speedcat Ballet Black Cool Dark Gray Satin (Women's)
Puma LaMelo Ball LaFrancé Amour 1 of 1

blue.description:
The Puma LaMelo Ball LaFrancé Amour 1 of 1 is an attractive, zany-looking trainer. The latest in the LaFrancé range, it's an upgrade that introduces LaMelo Bali's "Not From Here" NBA style. Its chunky design recalls the late Nineties sneaker trends.

These Puma trainers have a solid, dark pastel blue colorway, with shaded oval segments over the lace holes. They have bouncy, synthetic platform soles with EVA cushioning along the full length. The upper combines leather with a canvas base. For foot protection and stability, there's a full-wrap cup-sole.

We love the appearance of these trainers. They look like great fun to wear, not to mention seemingly indestructible. Little details have been added for convenience, too. The oversize laces are easy and quick to tie, plus there's a little handle at the back of the heel to pull them on and off. The Puma LaMelo Ball LaFrancé Amour 1 of 1 was released on September 12, 2024, priced at $110.

title: Puma Speedcat Ballet Whisp of Pink (Women's)

white.description:
The Puma Speedcat Ballet Whisp of Pink (Women's) is a women’s sized silhouette that merges the sleek profile of a ballet flat with the iconic DNA of the Speedcat, thus redefining motorsport heritage with a feminine twist.

Designed for everyday ease, this women’s sizing Puma Speedcat Ballet is a fusion of performance influence and everyday elegance. This chic slip-on silhouette is crafted out of a soft suede upper in a Whisp Pink shade. White and Whisp Pink elastic cross-foot bands allow the foot to breathe. A white embroidered logo sits on the lateral toebox area, while a debossed puma is on the heel. Inspired by racing culture but made for the streets, the Speedcat Ballet sits on a grippy tire tread sole that nods to its fast-paced roots.

We think that the standout feature of the low-profile Puma Speedcat Ballet Whisp of Pink (Women's) is how the white distinctive Formstrip is cut-out and embedded into the design for a modern, deconstructed look. When it was released on March 1, 2025, this shoe was originally priced at $80.

blue.description:
The Puma LaMelo Ball MB.04 LaFrancé is a cool mid grey and team light blue colorway from LaMelo Ball’s signature shoe line with Puma, this being the MB.04 version.

LaMelo Ball is a dynamic basketball player, and this is a fitting sneaker that pays homage to his abilities and hard-working ethos. The team's light blue hues and tentacle-like overlays combined with a spaceship image and "Not from here" wording embedded underfoot on the outsole adds to the out of this world theme. LaFrancé is LaMelo’s middle name, and references to it are seen on at the bottom of the tongue and on the heel. Ball’s signature winged 1 logo is prominent on the tongue.

It is our expert opinion that the 5D printing technology added dynamic elements and intricate patterns that incorporated words such as MELO, RARE, and LOVE on the upper and a tiny phrase is even embedded on the tip of the toe. The Puma LaMelo Ball MB.04 LaFrancé hit the shelves on September 12, 2024, with $125 as the recommended retail price.

title: Puma Speedcat OG Pelé Yellow Black
Puma Suede XL Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles

red.description: Step into the world of nostalgia and style with the Puma Suede XL Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles. This unique collaboration brings together the iconic Puma Suede silhouette with the beloved characters from the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles franchise. The sneaker features a vibrant green suede upper, reminiscent of the turtles' skin, accented with eye-catching purple details that pay homage to their masks. The gum sole adds a classic touch, providing both durability and traction for everyday wear. The Puma Suede XL Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles is more than just a sneaker; it's a statement piece for fans and sneaker enthusiasts alike. The oversized Puma Formstrip on the side showcases the brand's heritage, while subtle TMNT-inspired details throughout the shoe make it a true collector's item. With its comfortable fit and striking design, this shoe seamlessly blends pop culture with street style, making it perfect for both casual outings and showcasing your fandom. Us at StockX believe this product is great for those looking to add a playful yet stylish edge to their footwear collection, combining nostalgia with modern sneaker trends.

title: Puma LaMelo Ball LaFrancé Amour Chrome Silver
Puma LaMelo Ball MB.01 Iridescent Dreams

black.description:
The Puma LaMelo Ball MB01 Iridescent Dreams was NBA´s player first model done in collaboration with the German sport and lifestyle brand.

The LaMelo Ball MB01 sneaker has a monochromatic design in all black, coupled with luminous accents. The shoe is primarily made from a mixture of plastic, rubber, and mesh materials. The midsole is made out of foam, while the sole is made out of non-slip rubber. The tongue features silver designs and several small inscriptions, as well as black laces on top.

The Puma LaMelo Ball MB01 Iridescent Dreams was initially released on August 22nd, 2022, with a retail price of $125.

title: Puma LaMelo Ball LaFrancé Amour Untouchable

black.description:
The Puma LaMelo Ball LaFrancé Amour Untouchable adds a Puma Black and Glowing Pink colorway to NBA star LaMelo Ball’s chunky, Y2K-inspired sneaker.

As part of a collaboration between Puma and Ball’s brand LaFrancé, the Untouchable Puma LaMelo Ball LaFrancé Amour sneaker embraces exaggerated silhouettes and oversized detailing. For instance, extra-wide black laces thread through the eyelets and create an overlapping pattern over the lace cage. Padding in the tongue and collar gives the sneaker a bulky appearance, while the thick EVA midsole furthers the exaggerated look and spans the full length of the shoe. Although the upper is crafted from a combination of leather, textile, and synthetic leather, the sockliner and insole are 100 percent textile.

Our experts like the bubble-like, graffiti-inspired LaFrancé branding on the midsole. The bulbous shapes match the oval textile detailing in Glowing Pink on the upper. The Puma LaMelo Ball LaFrancé Amour Untouchable was released on July 19, 2024, and retailed for $110.

title: Puma Speedcat Ballet For All Time Red (Women's)

black.description:
The New Balance 9060 Triple Black exemplifies the essence of simplicity and versatility in a sports shoe.

Constructed with a breathable mesh and soft suede upper, the Triple Black New Balance 9060 prioritizes both comfort and temperature regulation, preventing overheating. Predominantly black, the mesh upper introduces a slightly softer dark charcoal hue, creating a balanced contrast. The iconic midfoot "N" motifs seamlessly integrate with the understated sole units, contributing to a unified aesthetic. The tongue logo pays homage to the original 991 lace jewel. Underneath, the sculpted pod midsole incorporates ABZORB, ENCAP, and SBS cushioning for optimal comfort.

The most noteworthy feature of the New Balance 9060 Triple Black is its sculpted pod midsole, which includes ABZORB, ENCAP, and SBS cushioning. This aspect ensures enduring comfort, establishing the shoe as an excellent choice for everyday wear. The sneaker was originally sold for $150 on September 22nd, 2023.

title: New Balance 2002R Protection Pack Rain Cloud

grey.description:
The New Balance 2002R Protection Pack Rain Cloud features a grey mesh upper with tonal jagged suede overlays and a reflective New Balance logo. From there, a cream Nrgy midsole and grey outsole complete the design.

The New Balance 2002R Protection Pack Rain Cloud released in August of 2021 and retailed for $150.

black.description:
The New Balance 9060 Black Castlerock Grey was inspired by a 90s model and comes in a grey, black, and red colorway.

This Black New Balance 9060 sneaker consists of a black mesh base with monochromatic pigskin suede and leather overlays. The shoe is designed with "N" branding on the side panel, a plush tongue, and flat laces. The model has a CR device at the heel. The design is completed by a chunky, dual-density midsole equipped with ABZORB and SBS cushioning.

The New Balance 9060 Black Castlerock Grey was released on September 2nd, 2022, at a retail price of $150.

white.description:
The New Balance 9060 Rain Cloud Grey takes on an early 2000s design by the American brand.

The sneaker displays tones of grey and off-white. It features a mixed-material upper that combines pigskin suede overlays with mesh, and the "N" emblem is accented with multiple silver details. The medial logo has a deconstructed appearance made up of parallel lines, while the"N" is solid on the lateral. The dual-density midsole, which sits on top of the diamond-shaped outsole, combines SBS cushioning and ABZORB technology.

The New Balance 9060 Rain Cloud Grey debuted on September 2nd, 2022, and originally retailed at $150.

black.description:
The New Balance 2002R Protection Pack Phantom features a charcoal mesh upper with monotone jagged suede overlays and unfinished edges. From there, a black Nrgy midsole and matching outsole add the finishing touches.

The New Balance 2002R Protection Pack Phantom originally released in August of 2021 and have since re-released multiple times. The New Balance 2002R Protection Pack retailed for $150. The New Balance 2002R Protection Pack Phantom re-released in 2024.

white.description:
The New Balance 530 White Silver Navy features a white mesh upper with metallic silver and white leather overlays. On the quarter panel, a grey New Balance logo outlined in navy adds contrast. From there, a white and grey ABZORB sole adds the finishing touch.

The New Balance 530 White Silver Navy released in February of 2021 and retailed for $95.

The New Balance 1906R Silver Black leans into Y2K trends with a striking colorway of metallic silver, black, and white.

Featuring a low-top, lace-up design inspired by sneakers from the early 2000s, this version of the 1906R boasts a white mesh base with black accents on the heel, sock liner, rubber outsole, and ribbons threading through the signature New Balance N logo. However, the shiny silver overlays crisscrossing the upper stand out the most. The ABZORB SBS heel increases stability, while the ABZORB midsole protects against impact stress. Finally, the N-ergy technology in the outsole adds superior shock absorption as the Stability Web supports the midfoot arch.

Our experts at StockX like the classic New Balance 1906R branding, including "1906R" on the overlays, "NB RUNNING" on the tongue, and "NB" on the heel. The New Balance 1906R Silver Black was released on June 1, 2024, and sold for $155.

title: New Balance 530 Silver Metallic Polka Dots

white.description:
The New Balance 530 Silver Metallic Polka Dots is a running shoe whose design was inspired by the original model that debuted in the 1990s.

This version of the New Balance 530 has an upper made of breathable mesh for its base. This base appears in a light silver color with white polka dots throughout. Supportive polyurethane overlays cross the upper in silver and white, while a Metallic Silver N appears on each side panel. 530 branding can also be seen on the lateral heel, while NB running branding appears on the tongue. The midsole is made of ABZORB cushioning for comfort and responsiveness, while the sole is patterned for traction.

What we think stands out about this shoe are the polka dots, which add a playful touch to the overall design. The New Balance 530 Silver Metallic Polka Dots was released on November 27, 2024, for a price of $100.

The New Balance 9060 Sea Salt White is a sleek and stylish sneaker that combines modern design with classic elements. The upper is made of premium leather and mesh, providing durability and breathability. The sea salt white colorway gives the shoe a clean and minimalist look, making it a versatile addition to any wardrobe. The release date for this shoe is January 14th, 2023, and with a retail price of $150. The New Balance 9060 Sea Salt White is perfect for those who want a comfortable and fashionable sneaker that can be worn for any occasion. With its high-quality materials and attention to detail, this shoe is sure to impress.

The New Balance 1906R White Metallic Gold comes in a metallic silver and metallic gold color scheme.

The New Balance 1906R White Metallic Gold adopts a classic silhouette with white leather and gold embellishments. The upper is breathable and lightweight, with a cushioned collar and tongue for comfort. The midsole is constructed from lightweight EVA foam for cushioning and support. Durable rubber is used to construct the outsole, which provides grip and steadiness. The shoe also features "N" branding in a contrasting gold and black colorway on both lateral sides.

The New Balance 1906R White Metallic Gold was made available on August 12th, 2022, for a retail price of $155.

title: New Balance 1906R Silver Metallic Sea Salt

black.description:
The New Balance 1906R Silver Metallic Sea Salt adds a neutral colorway with metallic accents to the recognizable 1906R silhouette.

Featuring a bulky construction and crisscrossing overlays, the New Balance 1906R Silver Metallic Sea Salt draws inspiration from early 2000s technical running shoes. However, the gentle colorway is a contemporary addition. The base features lightweight mesh in Sea Salt and synthetic leather overlays in Silver Metallic with reflective detailing. The ABZORB midsole and N-ergy cushioning provide stability and protect against impact. In addition, the Stability Web technology creates a supportive base for the runner. The laces come in Sea Salt and can be adjusted for a customizable fit.

Our experts at StockX like the splash of black beneath the heel that breaks up the Sea Salt and tan tones on the midsole. The New Balance 1906R Silver Metallic Sea Salt was released on November 24, 2023, and retailed at $155.

other.description: The New Balance 9060 Sea Salt Raincloud is a stylish and comfortable sneaker that combines modern design with classic New Balance aesthetics. Featuring a sleek silhouette, this shoe showcases a harmonious blend of sea salt and raincloud hues, creating a versatile and eye-catching look.
