The upper is crafted with premium materials, ensuring durability and breathability for all-day wear. The innovative ABZORB midsole technology provides superior cushioning and support, making these sneakers perfect for both casual outings and active lifestyles. Designed with attention to detail, the New Balance 9060 Sea Salt Raincloud boasts a chunky sole that adds a contemporary edge to its overall appearance. The shoe's construction incorporates a mix of suede and mesh panels, offering a luxurious feel and enhanced ventilation. The iconic 'N' logo is prominently displayed on the side, paying homage to the brand's heritage while embracing modern sneaker trends. With its balanced combination of style and functionality, this New Balance model is set to become a staple in any sneaker enthusiast's collection. Us at StockX believe this product is great for those seeking a versatile sneaker that effortlessly transitions from casual wear to light athletic activities, offering both comfort and style in one package.

white.description:
The New Balance 1906A Tech Explosion gives the 1906A an exaggerated technical makeover with overlapping, deconstructed overlays in a variety of metallic and matte hues.

As New Balance digs into its retro catalog, the 1906A Tech Explosion joins the ranks of reimagined technical running shoes with early 2000s roots. It features a classic, white mesh base with exaggerated synthetic and genuine leather overlays in Silver Metallic, Gold Metallic, and Castlerock. Each overlay stands out against the base, highlighting the individual design details. Nylon ribbons in Castlerock thread through the New Balance "N" and hang over the midsole, giving the sneaker an unfinished look.

Our StockX experts like the yellow-orange stains on the white midsole. They elevate the sneaker beyond models with an entirely off-white midsole, and pay homage to the shoe’s retro design elements. The New Balance 1906A Tech Explosion was released on July 24, 2024, and sold for $170.

The New Balance 9060 Triple White takes the classic 9060 silhouette and adds an all-white colorway. Including white on the upper, outsole, midsole, and lining allows the sneaker’s design elements to stand out.

This version of the 9060 finds inspiration in the 990 and the 860, giving the lifestyle shoe an early 2000s aesthetic. It features wavy leather overlays on the upper that complement the wavy pattern on the thick midsole. The upper is made of breathable mesh, while the heel displays a transparent CR device. This feature can be found on other 9060 models and supports heel stability. Although the curving logo on the tongue resembles the lace jewel on the 991, the diamond-like pattern of the outsole finds inspiration in the 860.

Our StockX experts like how ABZORB cushioning and pods in the midsole contribute to the sneaker’s chunky appearance. The New Balance 9060 Triple White was released on January 12th, 2024, and retailed at $150.

red.description:
The New Balance 990v6 Grey is another recent addition to the New Balance brand´s running catalog.

This 990v6 model in a grey color scheme features an upper mesh base with premium suede overlays. Branding elements are scattered throughout; for example, the V6 is noted in red on the tongue. The shoe features a sole unit underfoot with a contoured midsole. Its heels feature a series of curves and lines and a rubber outsole at the base. The sole utilizes ABZORB cushioning pluse Fuel Cell and ENCAP technology.

The New Balance 990v6 Grey was released on November 4th, 2022, at a retail price of $200.

DISCLAIMER: There are two versions of this shoe with the same style ID but they have a slight variation on the heel. The first version is shown in our product imagery and includes a New Balance NB logo on the heel. The second version has an American flag in. Both versions are acceptable for sellers to sell and buyers could receive either version in their order.

The New Balance 9060 Dark Olivine showcases this retrofuturistic model in a green hue similar to vintage army-issue garments. The sneaker reimagines the iconic 99X series, blending retro design elements with a daring, futuristic edge influenced by the tech-inspired aesthetics of the early 2000s.

The Dark Olivine New Balance 9060 upper features a mix of materials, starting with a mesh base with suede overlays in deep olive hues, providing a premium feel with breathable comfort. The signature jumbo "N" badge marks the lateral and medial sides, with more branding elements on the tongue, heel, and insole. The silhouette sits atop a chunky midsole featuring the trusted ABZORB and SRS cushioning systems, with a rubber outsole completing the sneaker’s design.

The New Balance 9060 Dark Olivine has a military-esque color palette, which blends olive tones for a rugged yet refined look. The Dark Olivine hue blends shades of khaki, sage green, and olive for a dynamic look that is both classic and minimalist. The sneaker debuted on the 15th of January 2025 for $160.

black.description:
The New Balance 740v2 Black Grey Silver is a sleek and stylish addition to the renowned New Balance lineup. This men's sneaker showcases a sophisticated color palette, combining black, grey, and silver hues for a versatile and modern aesthetic. The 740v2 model builds upon the success of its predecessor, offering enhanced comfort and performance features that cater to both casual wear and athletic pursuits.

Crafted with New Balance's signature attention to detail, the 740v2 boasts a durable construction that ensures longevity. The upper is designed with a combination of premium materials, providing both support and breathability for all-day comfort. The shoe's cushioning system offers responsive support, making it ideal for various activities, from daily walks to light workouts. Us at StockX believe this product is great for those seeking a balance between style and functionality in their footwear, as it seamlessly transitions from casual outings to more active scenarios.

red.description:
The New Balance 990v4 Made in USA Grey Silver is a part of the 990 series, which is well-known for its quality, comfort, and timeless aesthetic.

The New Balance 990v4 Grey Silver comes with an upper in different tones of Grey. With an upper crafted from a combination of premium pigskin suede and breathable mesh, it is durable, ventilated, and flexible, allowing for a wide range of movement. The mesh and suede parts come in a light grey colorway, and details of darker grey outline the mesh parts. The iconic " N" logo on the side of the shoe follows the same grey colorway. And ENCAP midsole technology provides a superior level of support and cushioning with its dual-density foam system.

But what our experts love most about the New Balance 990v4 Made in USA Grey Silver is the ABZORB technology set in the midsole to absorb shocks and reduce the impact of your steps. These shoes have been keeping feet stylish and comfortable since their release on June 2, 2023, for a price of $185.

white.description:
The New Balance 9060 Grey Jet Black is an athletic shoe featuring multiple layers on the upper. A Grey mesh fabric base is overlaid with Black suede that borders the midsole. Grey and White leather caging creates the soft geometry of the upper, accented by the linear N logo in White and Grey. The layered, textured mid- and outsole repeat the White, Grey, and Black colors, echoing the upper's layered aesthetic. New Balance branding appears on the tongue and rear heel.

Primarily known for running shoes, American sneaker brand New Balance has been honing its performance styles in Boston, Massachusetts, since 1906. The brand has attracted legions of devotees for its running-focused shoes. The 9060 made its debut in the 2020s, and its vintage-inspired early 2000s aesthetic has proved to be a versatile canvas for colorway improvisation.

Our experts believe that the 9060 Grey's best feature is its substantial sole, which lends it a modern throwback look. The New Balance 9060 Grey Jet Black was released on March 8, 2025, and retailed for $150.

title: New Balance 998 Core MiUSA Grey Silver

white.description:
The New Balance 998 Core MiUSA Grey Silver is part of New Balance’s Made In USA collection. It is also an updated version of the 998, the first shoe that featured NB’s ABZORB technology, originally released in 1993.

The sneaker features a back-to-basics colorway of Grey and Silver, with pops of white on the laces and the tongue branding. The upper offers a mesh and pigskin suede construction with reinforced white stitching. Plastic elements support the eyelets at the top of the lace cage and the area beneath the collar. The shoe displays straightforward branding, including "998 NEW BALANCE MADE IN USA" embroidered onto the tongue and "ABZORB" embossed on the midsole.

Our experts like how the overlays and texturized panels overlap on the upper. The New Balance 998 Core MiUSA Grey Silver was released on May 12th, 2023, and retailed for a price of $195.

black.description:
The New Balance 2002R Black Dark Grey blends urban looks with technical capabilities that offer a smart, quieted sneaker for versatile use. This edition leverages New Balance’s expertise in ergonomic design and long-lasting construction with refined, contemporary fashion.

The Black Dark Grey 2002R by New Balance features a suede and mesh upper in dark tones for breathability and structure. The ABZORB midsole technology offers shock absorption and comfort, while the N-ergy outsole gives you extra stability. Released as part of New Balance’s 2000 series, which originally debuted in 2010, this model maintains classic running-shoe elements with modern updates to give you a shoe that highlights the brand’s renowned craftsmanship and futuristic design.

What we love about the New Balance 2002R Black Dark Grey are its ABZORB cushioning for lasting comfort and the sturdy N-ergy outsole for added stability. Released at $145 on July 3, 2024, these features combine seamlessly for an everyday sneaker.

grey.description:
The New Balance 1906L Metallic Silver reimagines the 1906 as a slip-on loafer. This hybrid sneaker showcases a futuristic color palette of metallic silver and grey.

Seamlessly blending New Balance’s technical specs with the design requirements of a loafer, the Metallic Silver New Balance 1906L is lace-free. With N-ergy cushioning underfoot for shock absorption, the sneaker offers long-lasting comfort. The upper is crafted from a loose weave mesh that ensures durability, while the metallic silver accents draw attention to the supportive overlays. Although the sneaker doesn’t need laces, a traditional loafer apron crosses the tongue. It features a silver metallic sheen that matches the collar.

While many loafers include a tassel hanging over the vamp, this version doesn’t include a tassel. Our experts appreciate this exclusion because it maintains the sneaker’s sporty aesthetic. The New Balance 1906L Metallic Silver was released on September 19, 2024, and sold for $150.

white.description:
The New Balance 2002R Steel Grey Orca is an iteration of the New Balance 2002R running sneaker in a ‘Steel Grey Orca’ colorway.

This sneaker’s upper is made of a Grey mesh base cut out by Steel and Lead Grey leather overlays on the toe box. Lead Grey accents also appear on the upper eyelets, quarter panel, and the upper part of the tongue. The top overlay, which dominates the upper, features a premium Suede build in a Steel Grey tone highlighted by a Light Grey ‘N’ logo with a White outline and ‘2002R’ branding on the lateral ankle. A White Absorb midsole and a Black N-ergy outsole round out the design.

The New Balance 2002R Steel Grey Orca White was made available on October 21st, 2022, retailing at $140.

title: New Balance 2002R Protection Pack Sea Salt

grey.description:
The New Balance 2002R Protection Pack Sea Salt features a Sea Salt textile upper with tonal jagged suede overlays and unfinished edges. From there, a cream Nrgy midsole and grey outsole complete the design.

The New Balance 2002R Protection Pack Sea Salt released in August of 2021 and retailed for $150.

white.description:
The New Balance 9060 Mushroom Timberwolf puts a futuristic spin on classic New Balance designs, including the 99X, the 991, and the 860.

The Mushroom Timberwolf colorway of the New Balance 960 sports an upper of lightweight and breathable white mesh with pig suede overlays in complementary shades of gray, tan, and brown. The classic side panel N logo is constructed from pale embroidered dashed lines that match the cream-colored shoelaces. The heel features a semi-translucent CR device as well as NB branding. The sock liner is cream-colored and the black insole and gray tongue each sport New Balance branding. The outsole is black rubber with a red diamond traction pattern.

What we love most about this sneaker is the high-performance sole unit. The midsole is constructed of ABZORB in an exaggerated wavy pattern with ABZORB SBS in the heel for cushioning and impact absorption. The New Balance 9060 Mushroom Timberwolf was released on September 22, 2023, for a retail price of $150.

title: New Balance 1906A Olive Juice Sea Salt

white.description:
The New Balance 1906A Olive Juice Sea Salt brings a fresh twist to the deconstructed aesthetic, with the silhouette returning in a bold nature-inspired design featuring uncut panel edges.

The Olive Juice Sea Salt New Balance 1906A showcases an off-white honeycomb mesh upper with olive green and gray synthetic leather overlays. The signature "N" logo arrives semi-detached, forming part of the N-Lock lacing system for a secure fit. A glossy TPU heel cage in woodland hues provides heel stability, and the sneaker sits on a Sea Salt ACTEVALITE midsole housing N-ergy and ABZORB SBS cushioning systems. The Olive Juice edition blends earthy and aquatic-inspired hues with layered unfinished details, creating a sneaker that exudes both ruggedness and refinement.

Our experts love that the New Balance 1906A Olive Juice Sea Salt stays true to the NB 1906A’s DNA. This silhouette features layered unfinished details that add depth and texture to the design. The sneaker debuted on March 5, 2025, for $170.

The New Balance 990v6 MiUSA Workwear Grey updates the running shoe technology introduced in the 990 and designs a high-performance running shoe that is as stylish as it is dependable.

The Made in USA New Balance 990 v6 in a Workwear/Grey colorway begins with an upper base of tannish-orange mesh that offers lightweight breathability. Perforated dark-gray leather forms overlays that course across the upper, tannish-orange suede forms the overlays at the eyestays and mud guard, and silvery leather hits the upper at the collar. The gray and white ENCAP midsole is made with propulsive FuelCell foam that offers cushioning and energy return and a polyurethane rim that provides durability. This sneaker rides on a black and gray rubber outsole.

Our favorite feature of this sneaker is the design of the side panel N, which features horizontally corrugated silvery-gray synthetic that is also used in the upper eyestays. The New Balance 990v6 MiUSA Workwear Grey was released on March 4, 2024, for $200 retail.

title: New Balance 9060 ASOS Exclusive Pink Overdye

white.description:
The New Balance 9060 ASOS Exclusive Pink Overdye is an athletic shoe featuring an upper in Pink. A Pink mesh fabric base is overlaid with curved and geometric overlays in multiple textures of Pink suede. The New Balance N logo is smooth and shiny on the exterior, countered by striped N branding on the interior. The ABZORB branded midsole in Pink juts throughout a white base, finished by a Pink outsole. 

American athletic shoe brand New Balance was founded in 1906, and the company is known for their running-focused sneakers. The 9060 style debuted post-2020, and its design references the understated 990 and blends it with early 2000s styling. Known for its comfort with fashion-forward style, New Balance produced an exclusive monochrome Pink colorway of the 9060 for contemporary British retailer ASOS, whose name is synonymous with their of-the-moment aesthetic.

The fabrication of the 9060 ASOS Exclusive employs texture for definition. The New Balance 9060 ASOS Exclusive Pink Overdye released on July 24, 2024, and retailed for $150.

red.description: The New Balance 9060 Pearl Grey Linen offers a sophisticated blend of style and comfort. This men's sneaker showcases a refined color palette, combining pearl grey and linen hues for a versatile look that effortlessly transitions from casual to semi-formal settings. The upper features a mix of premium materials, including soft suede and breathable mesh, ensuring both durability and all-day comfort. Designed with New Balance's signature attention to detail, the 9060 model boasts an innovative sole unit that provides exceptional cushioning and support. The chunky midsole not only adds to the shoe's distinctive aesthetic but also incorporates advanced technology for superior shock absorption and energy return. With its sleek silhouette and carefully crafted details, this sneaker represents a perfect fusion of retro-inspired design and modern performance features. Us at StockX believe this product is great for those seeking a balance between fashion-forward styling and all-day comfort. The versatile colorway and premium construction make it an excellent choice for various occasions, from casual outings to more dressed-up events.

black.description:
The New Balance 9060 Triple Black Leather applies a black-on-black colorway and premium materials to the 9060’s technical silhouette.

This New Balance 9060 combines elements from two high-performance predecessors – the 990 and the 860. While several technical features are borrowed from the 990, the sneaker’s style details come from the 860. The upper features black mesh with soft suede and synthetic leather overlays. The incorporation of mesh allows the foot to breathe and reduces the shoe’s overall weight. The overlays create a wavy pattern that complements the curves of the chunky midsole and rubber outsole. The signature New Balance ‘N’ can be found on the side panels in tonal black leather.

Our StockX experts like the addition of a stacked ABZORB midsole, which gives the shoe a semi-bulky appearance and reduces impact stress. The New Balance 9060 Triple Black Leather was released on September 24th, 2023, and retailed at $170.

white.description:
The New Balance 550 White Grey features a white leather upper with monochromatic perforated leather overlays and puffed New Balance logos. From there, a woven New Balance Basketball tongue label and matching sole completes the design.

The New Balance 550 White Grey released in June of 2021 and retailed for $100.

The New Balance 740v2 Concord Grape is a running shoe featuring a White mesh fabric upper overlaid with graphic caging. The metallic finish caging is done in Concord Grape purple and Phantom, with linear accents of silver and white. The molded 3D New Balance N logo anchors the sides in Concord Grape, and a textured white midsole and black tread outsole complete the look. 

American footwear and athletic wear brand New Balance was founded in 1906, and the brand became known over time for their performance shoes that could act as daily runners, incurring heavy mileage. New Balance delved into their 2000s archives to reproduce the 740 in the 2020s, and its ABZORB midsole features its signature compression resistance and cushioning.

The 740v2 boasts caging in a bold Concord Grape hue, which is an uncommon running shoe color. The New Balance 740v2 Concord Grape released on January 15, 2025, and retailed for $110.

red.description:
The New Balance 9060 Sea Salt Moonbeam is a subtle-looking yet fashion-forward sports shoe that you can use for training and casual wear. It's extra comfy, thanks to New Balance's ABZORB cushioning.

New Balance 9060 trainers have always had great-looking, bold, modern styling. It's one of the hallmarks of the range. While this one is lightly colored and somewhat understated, it still gives off a distinctly high-tech air. The colorway combines a silvery upper with slightly grey panels, the Moonbeam shade. These alternate between breathable textiles and plush suede.

We like the fluid lines of this shoe, as well as its high-tech credentials. A sculpted midsole pod well protects the foot. Underneath are six cushioning platforms that combine to provide flexibility and high grip levels. We can't fault this shoe regarding foot support when running. The New Balance 9060 Sea Salt Moonbeam was released on 31 July 2024, priced at $150.

title: New Balance 9060 Slate Grey Arid Stone

red.description: The New Balance 9060 Slate Grey Arid Stone offers a sophisticated blend of style and comfort. This men's sneaker showcases a sleek silhouette in a versatile colorway of slate grey, arid stone, and timberwolf. The upper features a mix of premium materials, including suede and mesh, providing both durability and breathability. The chunky midsole, a signature element of the 9060 model, not only adds to the shoe's distinctive look but also ensures superior cushioning for all-day wear. Designed with both fashion and function in mind, this New Balance 9060 iteration combines retro-inspired elements with modern technology. The shoe's layered design and exaggerated proportions create a bold, eye-catching aesthetic that's perfect for streetwear enthusiasts. The carefully chosen color palette allows for easy pairing with various outfits, making it a versatile addition to any sneaker collection. Us at StockX believe this product is great for those seeking a balance between trendy design and everyday comfort, offering a unique blend of style and practicality.
